creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Is it still issue on more recent FreeBSD releases? 
(e.g. 8.1-RELEASE or 7.3-RELEASE) 
Actually I was not able to reproduce this on my box. If you have a 
reliable way to trigger the issue please let me know. 
Also I don't what driver is used for AirLink101 NIC. If the 
controller is still not supported on recent FreeBSD release please 
open a new PR about that.
